name: On Target VR Darts
short_description: On Target VR Darts is a physics-based darts simulation for Oculus headsets. Play Cricket, X01 and Around the world vs AI, Freethrow and Speed Darts. Gain achievements, customize your darts, and challenge players from around the world on our Leaderboards!
detailed_description:
On Target VR Darts

On Target VR Darts is a realistic darts simulation. If you like competitive darts, this is the game for you. Play Cricket, 501, 301 and Around the world vs AI. Get the hang of things in Freethrow, or warm up in a quick round of Speed Darts. Gain achievements, fully customize your darts, play in three high quality environments and challenge players from around the world for top spot on our Leaderboards.

Multiplayer integration is currently in development.

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts about the game! Reviews really help small Indie Developers like us make better games.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Spanish - Latin America
